config.script:
function customer_preferences(eTyp) dim page:set page = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_POLITYKA_FIRMY appvar_settings_type=TYPEID_N5KLIENT appvar_klient_type=" + cstr(eTyp)) page.domodalauto end function
function ewid_etyk_preferences() dim page:set page = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_POLITYKA_FIRMY appvar_settings_type=TYPEID_N5DOKETYK appvar_klient_type=-1") page.domodalauto end function
function product_preferences() dim page:set page = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_POLITYKA_FIRMY appvar_settings_type=TYPEID_N5PRODUKT appvar_klient_type=-1") page.domodalauto end function
function document_preferences() dim page:set page = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_POLITYKA_FIRMY appvar_settings_type=TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT appvar_klient_type=-1") page.domodalauto end function
function package_preferences() dim page:set page = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_POLITYKA_FIRMY appvar_settings_type=TYPEID_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU appvar_klient_type=-1") page.domodalauto end function
function dok_rej_preferences(idRej,settings_type) : dok_rej_preferences = false dok_rej_preferences = dok_rej_preferences_ex(idRej,settings_type,1) end function
function dok_rej_preferences_ex(idRej,settings_type,nKonf) : dok_rej_preferences_ex = false dim pConfigPageHLI : set pConfigPageHLI = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_RECORD_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_KONFIG_DOK_WITH_REJESTR") pConfigPageHLI.prop(APPVAR_SETTINGS_TYPE) = clng(settings_type) pConfigPageHLI.prop(GVAR_OBJECT) = idRej pConfigPageHLI.prop(APPVAR_REJDOKCONF_KONFIGURACJA) = clng(nKonf)
dim pConfigPage : set pConfigPage = doc_.getpagehli(pConfigPageHLI)
if not pConfigPage is nothing then if pConfigPage.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE then dok_rej_preferences_ex = true end if end if
end function
